footer.tagline: Premium airport services worldwide. Travel as you deserve.

home.hero_sub: Book Fast Track, Meet & Greet, and Lounge Access at 180+ airports worldwide — in under 60 seconds.
home.services_title:
Designed for travellers
who value their time.
home.services_subtitle: Three experiences. Every major airport. Booked in a tap.
home.fast_track_desc: Skip the security queue with dedicated fast-track lanes. Get to your gate in minutes.
home.meet_greet_desc: A dedicated personal assistant meets you and guides you every step of the way.
home.lounge_desc: Relax in premium airport lounges with food, drinks, and high-speed Wi-Fi.
home.step1_desc: Enter your airport and date to see all available services.
home.step2_desc: Compare Fast Track, Meet & Greet, and Lounge options.
home.step4_desc: Show your booking reference at the airport. Done.
home.airports_subtitle: Discover premium services at the world's busiest hubs.
home.reviews_subtitle: Real reviews from travellers who chose AirportFaster.
home.review_1_text: The fast track at Dubai saved me 45 minutes. Absolutely worth it for an early flight.
home.review_2_text: Meet & greet in Istanbul made connecting with three kids painless. Highly recommend.
home.review_3_text: Lounge access at Heathrow before a long-haul — exactly what I needed. Easy booking.
home.faq_q1: How far in advance should I book?
home.faq_a1: We recommend booking at least 24–48 hours in advance. Some services may be available with shorter notice, but early booking guarantees availability.
home.faq_q2: Can I cancel or change my booking?
home.faq_a2: Yes. You can modify or cancel up to 24 hours before the service date for a full refund. See our terms for full details.
home.faq_q3: What is fast track and who is it for?
home.faq_a3: Fast track is a dedicated security channel that lets you bypass the standard queue. It's ideal for business travellers, families, or anyone who values their time.
home.faq_q4: Is meet & greet available for arrivals and departures?
home.faq_a4: Yes — meet & greet is available for arrivals, departures, and connections. Your dedicated agent will be with you from the moment you land or check in.
home.cta_sub: Join 50,000+ travellers who skip the queues and arrive refreshed.
home.partners_title: Trusted by leading travel & hospitality brands
home.partners_description: We work hand-in-hand with hotels, transport providers, and tour operators to deliver a seamless, end-to-end journey for every traveller.

airport.how_step2: Receive confirmation and agent contact details.
airport.how_step3: Arrive and meet your dedicated agent at the agreed point.
airport.faq_q1: How far in advance should I book?
airport.faq_a1: We recommend booking at least 24-48 hours in advance. Some services may be available with shorter notice depending on the airport.
airport.faq_q2: Can I get a refund if I cancel?
airport.faq_a2: Full refunds are available up to 24 hours before the service date. For late cancellations, please contact our support team.
airport.service_meta_description: Book {service} at {airport} ({iata}) in {city}. Skip the queue and experience premium airport assistance. Instant confirmation with AirportFaster.
airport.service_meta_page_description: Book fast track, meet & greet, and lounge access at {name} ({iata}) in {city}. Skip the queue and fly premium with AirportFaster.

booking.refund_policy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before

booking.section_flight_help: Help us match your booking with your flight.
booking.error_service_required: Please choose a service before continuing.

services_list.meta_title: Airport Services — Fast Track, Meet & Greet, Lounge | AirportFaster
services_list.meta_description: Explore all premium airport services available through AirportFaster. Book online in minutes.
services_list.hero_subtitle: From fast track security to private meet & greet and premium lounge access — every way AirportFaster elevates your airport experience.
services_list.empty: No services available right now. Check back soon.
services_list.cta_subtitle: Search by airport to find available services, live pricing, and instant booking.

for_business.hero_subtitle: Join the premium airport services marketplace and reach travellers looking for a better way through the airport.
for_business.partner_airports_desc: Distribute your premium services to a global network of travellers. We handle marketing, booking, and payments — you deliver the experience on the ground.
for_business.partner_airlines_desc: Offer AirportFaster services as ancillary products to your passengers. Grow revenue while delighting your most frequent flyers.
for_business.partner_corporate_desc: Simplify the airport experience for your business travellers with centralised billing, reporting, and a dedicated account manager.
for_business.partner_ota_desc: Integrate AirportFaster airport services into your booking flow via our API. Earn commissions on every service sold to your customers.
for_business.stat_bookings_desc: A growing base of premium travellers booking airport services every week.
for_business.stat_airports_desc: Coverage across major hubs in Europe, the Middle East, and Asia.
for_business.stat_rating_desc: Strict quality standards ensure consistently excellent traveller reviews.
for_business.contact_subtitle: Fill in the form and someone from our partnerships team will be in touch within two business days.
for_business.form_message_placeholder: Tell us about your organisation and how you'd like to partner with AirportFaster.
for_business.form_error: Something went wrong. Please email us at sales@airportfaster.com.
for_business.form_success_body: We have received your enquiry and will be in touch shortly.

service_pages.available_at_count: {count, plural, =0 {Coming soon to airports near you} =1 {Available at 1 airport} other {Available at # airports}}

default.intro: Premium {name} service available at airports worldwide through AirportFaster.
default.step1_desc: Complete your booking in under 2 minutes with your flight details.
default.step2_desc: Your dedicated agent meets you at the agreed point with a personalised sign.
default.step3_desc: Enjoy priority service and arrive stress-free at your departure gate.
default.faq1_q: How far in advance should I book?
default.faq1_a: We recommend booking at least 24 to 48 hours in advance. For peak travel seasons, book earlier to secure availability.
default.faq2_q: What happens if my flight is delayed?
default.faq2_a: Our agents monitor flight times and adapt automatically. Contact us if the delay is significant so we can re-coordinate with the service team.
default.faq3_q: Can I cancel or modify my booking?
default.faq3_a: Full refunds are available up to 24 hours before the service date. For changes, manage your booking from /manage or email support@airportfaster.com.
default.faq4_q: Is this service available for all airlines?
default.faq4_a: Yes — our services are independent of airline or cabin class. Anyone with a ticket from that airport can book.

fast_track.step1_desc: Complete your booking online with your flight details — it takes under two minutes.
fast_track.step2_desc: We email you a confirmation with the exact meeting point and your agent's contact details.
fast_track.step3_desc: Your agent escorts you through dedicated fast-track security channels — most travellers clear in under 10 minutes.
fast_track.faq1_a: Fast Track is a dedicated security and (where available) immigration lane that lets you skip the regular queues. It's ideal for business travellers, families, and anyone tight on time.
fast_track.faq2_q: Does Fast Track guarantee a specific clearance time?
fast_track.faq2_a: It significantly reduces waiting. Actual clearance time depends on airport traffic, but most passengers clear in under 10 minutes using the dedicated lane.
fast_track.faq3_q: Can I book Fast Track for my whole family?
fast_track.faq3_a: Yes — select the correct number of adults, children, and infants when booking. Children under 2 are usually free.
fast_track.faq4_q: What if my flight is cancelled or rescheduled?
fast_track.faq4_a: Contact our support team. We'll arrange a free reschedule or full refund — no questions asked.
fast_track.what_is: Airport Fast Track is a dedicated security and immigration lane that lets you bypass the standard queue. An agent escorts you through a priority channel, so most passengers clear security in under 10 minutes — regardless of how busy the airport is.
fast_track.benefit1: Save up to 60 minutes at busy checkpoints
fast_track.benefit2: Dedicated agent escorts you the whole way
fast_track.benefit3: Available for families, solo travellers, and groups

meet_and_greet.step1_desc: Share your flight number and any special requirements when you book.
meet_and_greet.step2_desc: A dedicated agent meets you at arrivals (or check-in) with your name on a board.
meet_and_greet.step3_desc: Your agent helps with luggage and guides you through customs, baggage claim, and onward transport.
meet_and_greet.faq1_a: A dedicated agent meets you at the airport, assists with luggage, guides you through formalities, and escorts you to your onward transport or departure gate.
meet_and_greet.faq2_q: Where exactly will my agent meet me?
meet_and_greet.faq2_a: The exact meeting point is confirmed in your booking email — typically the arrivals hall or a clearly marked meeting area.
meet_and_greet.faq3_q: Is this suitable for elderly or mobility-impaired travellers?
meet_and_greet.faq3_a: Absolutely. Our agents are trained to assist passengers with special requirements. Note any needs when booking and we'll arrange appropriate assistance.
meet_and_greet.faq4_q: What languages do your agents speak?
meet_and_greet.faq4_a: Language coverage varies by airport. English is always available. Request a specific language at booking and we'll do our best to match.
meet_and_greet.what_is: Airport Meet & Greet is a personal assistance service where a dedicated agent meets you at arrivals or check-in, helps with your luggage, guides you through customs and formalities, and escorts you to your gate or onward transport.
meet_and_greet.benefit1: Personal agent from arrival to departure gate
meet_and_greet.benefit3: Available for elderly, families, and VIP travellers

lounge_access.step1_desc: Pick your airport, choose your preferred lounge, and complete the booking in minutes.
lounge_access.step2_desc: Your lounge pass arrives by email — no membership card or printout required.
lounge_access.step3_desc: Present your pass at the lounge entrance and enjoy complimentary food, drinks, and Wi-Fi.
lounge_access.faq1_a: Available lounges vary by airport. After you pick your airport, all bookable lounges for that location are listed with descriptions and amenities.
lounge_access.faq2_q: Is lounge access tied to my airline or ticket class?
lounge_access.faq2_a: No — AirportFaster lounge access is independent of your airline and cabin class. Anyone with a valid ticket from that airport can book.
lounge_access.faq3_q: How long can I stay in the lounge?
lounge_access.faq3_a: Standard access is up to 3 hours before your flight. Some lounges offer extended stays — check the lounge details before booking.
lounge_access.faq4_a: Most lounges include complimentary food and non-alcoholic drinks, fast Wi-Fi, comfortable seating, and showers. Premium lounges may add spa, à la carte dining, and alcoholic beverages.
lounge_access.what_is: Airport Lounge Access lets you relax in a premium departure lounge before your flight — regardless of your airline or ticket class. Enjoy complimentary food, drinks, fast Wi-Fi, comfortable seating, and shower facilities while you wait to board.
lounge_access.benefit1: Access any bookable lounge, any airline or class
lounge_access.benefit2: Complimentary food, drinks, Wi-Fi, and showers
lounge_access.benefit3: Digital pass — no membership card required

admin_login.error_network: A network error occurred. Please check your connection.

manage.meta_description: Look up your AirportFaster booking by reference and email to edit details, request a cancellation, or file a complaint.
manage.title: Manage your booking
manage.subtitle: Enter your booking reference and email address to continue.
manage.need_help: Lost your reference? Check your confirmation email or contact support.
manage.cancel_body: You'll receive a full refund to your original payment method. This usually takes 5–10 business days.
manage.cancel_reason_placeholder: Help us improve — why are you cancelling?
manage.cancel_within_24: Cancellation is no longer available — your service is less than 24 hours away. Please contact support directly.
manage.cancel_success: Your booking has been cancelled. A refund has been initiated.
manage.complaint_body: We take every complaint seriously. Our team will review your case and respond within 24 hours.
manage.complaint_message_placeholder: Please share as much detail as possible…
manage.complaint_success: Thank you. Your complaint has been received — we'll be in touch within 24 hours.
manage.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
manage.help_text: Lost your reference? Check your confirmation email or contact our support team.
manage.modify_desc: To change flight details, passengers, or any other booking information, please contact our support team.
manage.cancel_desc: Free cancellation is available up to 24 hours before your service date.
manage.not_found_desc: This manage link has expired or is invalid. Please use the lookup form.
manage.check_email_desc: If a booking matching your details was found, we've sent you a link.
manage.lookup_subtitle: Enter your booking reference and email address.

processing.title: Processing your booking
processing.subtitle: Hang tight — we're confirming your payment with our secure provider. This usually takes only a few seconds.

confirmation_page.next_2_desc: We'll assign your personal airport specialist within a few hours.
confirmation_page.next_3_desc: You'll receive a final confirmation message the day before your service.

help.title: How can we help?
help.subtitle: Search our help center or browse common topics.
help.contact_subtitle: Need more help? Our team is here for you 24/7.
help.meta_description: Find answers to your questions about booking, payment, cancellation, and airport services on AirportFaster.
